/CAL:DEFENDANT'S PC 1203,4A MOTION/MO GRTD/X:THE COURT GRANTS MOTION PURSUANT TO PC 1203,4A,/X:THE COURT MAKES A FINDING AND GRANTS MOTION PURSUANTTO PC  1203,4A  IN THE INTEREST OF JUSTICE,/X:PURSUANT TO SIGNED AND FILED ORDER GUILTY PLEA IS SET ASIDE AND A NOT GUILTY PLEA IS ENTERED,/X:ORDERFOR DISMISSAL SIGNED AND FILED IN COURT,/

/X:JOHN LEE SPECIALLY APPEARED FOR THE ATTORNEY OF RECORD/CAL:SPR ELIGIBILITY REPORT/X:SPR IS DENIED/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/CONTD:JURY TRIAL/LD:08-06-07/DOP/X:MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE 2318389, 2323072, AND 2312028 WAS FILED AND WILL BE HEARD ON 07-16-07/X:DA TIFFANY SUTTON FILED A MOTION TO ADD THE DEFENDANT'S OTHER MATTERS TOCALENDAR ON 07-16-07/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/DOP/ NTW/LD:08-06-07/BAIL:10000/X:SPECIAL APPEARANCE BY CONFLICTS ATTORNEY JOHN F, LEE/CONTD SPR ELIG REPORT, DOP/CONTD:FOR SPR ELIGIBILITY REPORT
/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:1/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/X:REMANDED NUNC PRO TUNC TO 05-28-07/BAIL:5/
